61970-302_Dynamics-AP-Con-Complex-SHACL

dyn.AsynchronousMachineEquivalentCircuit​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.AsynchronousMachineEquivalentCircuit
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.AsynchronousMachineEquivalentCircuit

Nested Properties:

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.damping-valueRange​

Damping torque coefficient (D) (>= 0). A proportionality constant that, when multiplied by the angular velocity of the rotor poles with respect to the magnetic field (frequency), results in the damping torque. This value is often zero when the sources of damping torques (generator damper windings, load damping effects, etc.) are modelled in detail. Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.inertia-valueRange​

Inertia constant of generator or motor and mechanical load (H) (> 0). This is the specification for the stored energy in the rotating mass when operating at rated speed. For a generator, this includes the generator plus all other elements (turbine, exciter) on the same shaft and has units of MW x s. For a motor, it includes the motor plus its mechanical load. Conventional units are PU on the generator MVA base, usually expressed as MW x s / MVA or just s. This value is used in the accelerating power reference frame for operator training simulator solutions. Typical value = 3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.saturationFactor-valueRange​

Saturation factor at rated terminal voltage (S1) (>= 0). Not used by simplified model. Defined by defined by S(E1) in the SynchronousMachineSaturationParameters diagram. Typical value = 0,02.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp-valueRangePair​

Subtransient reactance (unsaturated) (X'') (> RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp

dyn.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSubtrans-valueRangePair​

Direct-axis subtransient reactance (unsaturated) (X''d) (> RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is greater than or equal to SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSubtrans."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSubtrans

dyn.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSubtrans-valueRangePair​

Quadrature-axis subtransient reactance (X''q) (> RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is greater than or equal to SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSubtrans."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSubtrans

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance-valueRange​

Stator leakage reactance (Xl) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,15.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorResistance-valueRange​

Stator (armature) resistance (Rs) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,005.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance

Nested Properties:

dyn.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tppo-valueRange​

Subtransient rotor time constant (T''o) (> 0). Typical value = 0,03.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tpo-valueRangePair​

Transient rotor time constant (T'o) (> AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tppo). Typical value = 5.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tpo."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.tpo

dyn.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xs-valueRangePair​

Synchronous reactance (Xs) (>= AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xp). Typical value = 1,8.

Messages:

  • "The value is greater than AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xs."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanOrEqualsConstraintComponentPath: cim.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xs

dyn.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xp-valueRangePair​

Transient reactance (unsaturated) (X') (>= AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp). Typical value = 0,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is greater than AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xp."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanOrEqualsConstraintComponentPath: cim.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xp

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.damping-valueRange​

Damping torque coefficient (D) (>= 0). A proportionality constant that, when multiplied by the angular velocity of the rotor poles with respect to the magnetic field (frequency), results in the damping torque. This value is often zero when the sources of damping torques (generator damper windings, load damping effects, etc.) are modelled in detail. Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.inertia-valueRange​

Inertia constant of generator or motor and mechanical load (H) (> 0). This is the specification for the stored energy in the rotating mass when operating at rated speed. For a generator, this includes the generator plus all other elements (turbine, exciter) on the same shaft and has units of MW x s. For a motor, it includes the motor plus its mechanical load. Conventional units are PU on the generator MVA base, usually expressed as MW x s / MVA or just s. This value is used in the accelerating power reference frame for operator training simulator solutions. Typical value = 3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.saturationFactor-valueRange​

Saturation factor at rated terminal voltage (S1) (>= 0). Not used by simplified model. Defined by defined by S(E1) in the SynchronousMachineSaturationParameters diagram. Typical value = 0,02.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSubtrans-valueRangePair​

Direct-axis subtransient reactance (unsaturated) (X''d) (> RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is greater than or equal to SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSubtrans."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xDirectSubtrans

Subtransient reactance (unsaturated) (X'') (> RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.AsynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xpp

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance-valueRange​

Stator leakage reactance (Xl) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,15.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSubtrans-valueRangePair​

Quadrature-axis subtransient reactance (X''q) (> RotatingMachineDynamics.statorLeakageReactance). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is greater than or equal to SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSubtrans."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.SynchronousMachineTimeConstantReactance.xQuadSubtrans

dyn.RotatingMachineDynamics.statorResistance-valueRange​

Stator (armature) resistance (Rs) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,005.

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A

Nested Properties:

dyn.DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.tan-valueRange​

Discontinuous controller time constant (TAN) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,08.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.td-valueRange​

Time constant (TD) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,03.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.tl1-valueRange​

Time constant (TL1) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,025.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.tl2-valueRange​

Time constant (TL2) (>= 0). Typical value = 1,25.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.tw5-valueRange​

DEC washout time constant (TW5) (>= 0). Typical value = 5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.vomin-valueRangePair​

Limiter (VOMIN) (< DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.vomax). Typical value = 0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.vomax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.vomax

dyn.DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.vsmin-valueRangePair​

Limiter (VSMIN) (< DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.vsmax). Typical value = -0,066.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.vsmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.DiscExcContIEEEDEC1A.vsmax

dyn.ExcAC1A​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.ExcAC1A
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.ExcAC1A

Nested Properties:

dyn.ExcAC1A.ka-valueRange​

Voltage regulator gain (Ka) (> 0). Typical value = 400.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.kc-valueRange​

Rectifier loading factor proportional to commutating reactance (Kc) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.kd-valueRange​

Demagnetizing factor, a function of exciter alternator reactances (Kd) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,38.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.kf-valueRange​

Excitation control system stabilizer gains (Kf) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,03.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.kf1-valueRange​

Coefficient to allow different usage of the model (Kf1) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.kf2-valueRange​

Coefficient to allow different usage of the model (Kf2) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.ks-valueRange​

Coefficient to allow different usage of the model-speed coefficient (Ks) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.seve1-valueRange​

Exciter saturation function value at the corresponding exciter voltage, Ve1, back of commutating reactance (Se[Ve1]) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.seve2-valueRange​

Exciter saturation function value at the corresponding exciter voltage, Ve2, back of commutating reactance (Se[Ve2]) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,03.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.ta-valueRange​

Voltage regulator time constant (Ta) (> 0). Typical value = 0,02.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.tb-valueRange​

Voltage regulator time constant (Tb) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.tc-valueRange​

Voltage regulator time constant (Tc) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.te-valueRange​

Exciter time constant, integration rate associated with exciter control (Te) (> 0). Typical value = 0,8.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.tf-valueRange​

Excitation control system stabilizer time constant (Tf) (> 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.vamax-valueRange​

Maximum voltage regulator output (Vamax) (> 0). Typical value = 14,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.vamin-valueRange​

Minimum voltage regulator output (Vamin) (< 0). Typical value = -14,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is positive or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.ve1-valueRange​

Exciter alternator output voltages back of commutating reactance at which saturation is defined (Ve1) (> 0). Typical value = 4,18.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.ve2-valueRange​

Exciter alternator output voltages back of commutating reactance at which saturation is defined (Ve2) (> 0). Typical value = 3,14.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.vrmax-valueRange​

Maximum voltage regulator outputs (Vrmax) (> 0). Typical value = 6,03.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcAC1A.vrmin-valueRange​

Minimum voltage regulator outputs (Vrmin) (< 0). Typical value = -5,43.

Messages:

  • "The value is positive or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Constraints:

ComponentDetails

dyn.ExcAC2A.kf-valueRange​

dyn.ExcAC8B.vimin-valueRangePair​

ComponentDetails

  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.ExcBBC

Nested Properties:

dyn.ExcBBC.efdmin-valueRangePair​

Minimum open circuit exciter voltage (Efdmin) (< ExcBBC.efdmax). Typical value = -5.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcBBC.efdmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcBBC.efdmax

dyn.ExcBBC.t1-valueRange​

Controller time constant (T1) (>= 0). Typical value = 6.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcBBC.t2-valueRange​

Controller time constant (T2) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcBBC.t3-valueRange​

Lead/lag time constant (T3) (>= 0). If = 0, block is bypassed. Typical value = 0,05.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcBBC.t4-valueRange​

Lead/lag time constant (T4) (>= 0). If = 0, block is bypassed. Typical value = 0,01.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcBBC.vrmin-valueRangePair​

Minimum control element output (Vrmin) (< ExcBBC.vrmax). Typical value = -5.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcBBC.vrmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcBBC.vrmax

dyn.ExcBBC.xe-valueRange​

Effective excitation transformer reactance (Xe) (>= 0). Xe models the regulation of the transformer/rectifier unit. Typical value = 0,05.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC1A.efd2-valueRange​

Exciter voltage at which exciter saturation is defined (Efd2) (> 0). Typical value = 2,3.

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC1A.efdmin-valueRangePair​

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcDC1A.edfmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcDC1A.edfmax

dyn.ExcDC1A.ka-valueRange​

Voltage regulator gain (Ka) (> 0). Typical value = 46.

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC1A.kf-valueRange​

Excitation control system stabilizer gain (Kf) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Exciter saturation function value at the corresponding exciter voltage, Efd1 (Se[Eefd1]) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,33.

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC1A.seefd2-valueRange​

Exciter saturation function value at the corresponding exciter voltage, Efd2 (Se[Eefd2]) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC1A.ta-valueRange​

Voltage regulator time constant (Ta) (> 0). Typical value = 0,06.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC1A.tb-valueRange​

Voltage regulator time constant (Tb) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC1A.tc-valueRange​

Voltage regulator time constant (Tc) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC1A.te-valueRange​

Exciter time constant, integration rate associated with exciter control (Te) (> 0). Typical value = 0,46.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC1A.tf-valueRange​

Excitation control system stabilizer time constant (Tf) (> 0). Typical value = 1.

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcDC1A.vrmin-valueRangePair​

Minimum voltage regulator output (Vrmin) (< 0 and < ExcDC1A.vrmax). Typical value = -0,9.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcELIN1.ts1-valueRange​

Stabilizer phase lag time constant (Ts1) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcELIN1.ts2-valueRange​

Stabilizer filter time constant (Ts2) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcELIN1.tsw-valueRange​

Stabilizer parameters (Tsw) (>= 0). Typical value = 3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcELIN1.xe-valueRange​

Excitation transformer effective reactance (Xe) (>= 0). Xe represents the regulation of the transformer/rectifier unit. Typical value = 0,06.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.ExcELIN2

Nested Properties:

dyn.ExcELIN2.iefmin-valueRangePair​

Limiter (Iefmin) (< ExcELIN2.iefmax). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcELIN2.iefmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcELIN2.iefmax

dyn.ExcELIN2.seve1-valueRange​

Exciter saturation function value at the corresponding exciter voltage, Ve1, back of commutating reactance (Se[Ve1]) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcELIN2.tb1-valueRange​

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcELIN2.te-valueRange​

Time constant (Te) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

dyn.ExcELIN2.te2-valueRange​

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcELIN2.ti3-valueRange​

  • "The value is negative."

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcELIN2.ti4-valueRange​

dyn.ExcELIN2.tr4-valueRange​

sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcELIN2.upmin-valueRangePair​

Limiter (Upmin) (< ExcELIN2.upmax). Typical value = 0.

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcELIN2.upmax."

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcELIN2.upmax

Exciter alternator output voltages back of commutating reactance at which saturation is defined (Ve1) (> 0). Typical value = 3.

dyn.ExcELIN2.ve2-valueRange​

dyn.ExcHU​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.ExcHU
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.ExcHU

Nested Properties:

dyn.ExcHU.emin-valueRangePair​

Field voltage control signal lower limit on AVR base (Emin) (< ExcHU.emax). Typical value = -0,866.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcHU.emax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcHU.emax

dyn.ExcHU.imin-valueRangePair​

Major loop PI tag output signal lower limit (Imin) (< ExcHU.imax). Typical value = 0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcBBC.vrmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcHU.imax

dyn.ExcHU.te-valueRange​

Major loop PI tag integration time constant (Te) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,154.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcHU.ti-valueRange​

Minor loop PI control tag integration time constant (Ti) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,01333.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcHU.tr-valueRange​

Filter time constant (Tr) (>= 0). If a voltage compensator is used in conjunction with this excitation system model, Tr should be set to 0. Typical value = 0,01.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEDC4B.kd-valueRange​

Regulator derivative gain (KD) (>= 0). Typical value = 20.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEDC4B.kf-valueRange​

Excitation control system stabilizer gain (KF) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEDC4B.ki-valueRange​

Regulator integral gain (KI) (>= 0). Typical value = 20.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEDC4B.kp-valueRange​

Regulator proportional gain (KP) (>= 0). Typical value = 20.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEDC4B.seefd1-valueRange​

Exciter saturation function value at the corresponding exciter voltage, EFD1 (SE[EFD1]) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,08.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEDC4B.seefd2-valueRange​

Exciter saturation function value at the corresponding exciter voltage, EFD2 (SE[EFD2]) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,27.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEDC4B.ta-valueRange​

Voltage regulator time constant (TA) (> 0). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEDC4B.te-valueRange​

Exciter time constant, integration rate associated with exciter control (TE) (> 0). Typical value = 0,8.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEDC4B.tf-valueRange​

Excitation control system stabilizer time constant (TF) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEDC4B.vemin-valueRange​

Minimum exciter voltage output (VEMIN) (<= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is positive."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEDC4B.vrmin-valueRangePair​

Minimum voltage regulator output (VRMIN) (<= 0 and < ExcIEEEDC4B.vrmax). Typical value = -0,9.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcIEEEDC4B.vrmax; or positive."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcIEEEDC4B.vrmax

dyn.ExcIEEEST1A.vimax-valueRange​

Maximum voltage regulator input limit (VIMAX) (> 0). Typical value = 999.

sh.MaxExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEST3A.ka-valueRange​

sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEST7B.tg-valueRange​

Feedback time constant of inner loop field voltage regulator (TG) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEST7B.tia-valueRange​

Feedback time constant (TIA) (>= 0). Typical value = 3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEST7B.vmax-valueRange​

Maximum voltage reference signal (VMAX) (> 0 and > ExcIEEEST7B.vmin). Typical value = 1,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEST7B.vmin-valueRangePair​

Minimum voltage reference signal (VMIN) (> 0 and < ExcIEEEST7B.vmax). Typical value = 0,9.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcIEEEST7B.vmax; or negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcIEEEST7B.vmax

dyn.ExcIEEEST7B.vrmax-valueRange​

Maximum voltage regulator output (VRMAX) (> 0). Typical value = 5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcIEEEST7B.vrmin-valueRange​

Minimum voltage regulator output (VRMIN) (< 0). Typical value = -4,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is positive or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcNI​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.ExcNI
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.ExcNI

Nested Properties:

dyn.ExcNI.ka-valueRange​

Voltage regulator gain (Ka) (> 0). Typical value = 210.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcNI.kf-valueRange​

Excitation control system stabilizer gain (Kf) (> 0). Typical value 0,01.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcNI.r-valueRange​

rc / rfd (R) (>= 0). 0 means exciter has negative current capability

0 means exciter does not have negative current capability.
Typical value = 5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcNI.ta-valueRange​

Voltage regulator time constant (Ta) (> 0). Typical value = 0,02.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcNI.tf1-valueRange​

Excitation control system stabilizer time constant (Tf1) (> 0). Typical value = 1,0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcNI.tf2-valueRange​

Excitation control system stabilizer time constant (Tf2) (> 0). Typical value = 0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcNI.tr-valueRange​

Time constant (Tr) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,02.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcNI.vrmin-valueRangePair​

Minimum voltage regulator ouput (Vrmin) (< ExcNI.vrmax). Typical value = -2,0.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcNI.vrmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcNI.vrmax

  • targetClass: cim.ExcREXS
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.ExcREXS

dyn.ExcREXS.kf-valueRange​

Rate feedback gain (Kf) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,05.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcREXS.ta-valueRange​

Voltage regulator time constant (Ta) (>= 0). If = 0, block is bypassed. Typical value = 0,01.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcREXS.tb1-valueRange​

Lag time constant (Tb1) (>= 0). If = 0, block is bypassed. Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcREXS.tb2-valueRange​

Lag time constant (Tb2) (>= 0). If = 0, block is bypassed. Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcREXS.tc1-valueRange​

Lead time constant (Tc1) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcREXS.tc2-valueRange​

Lead time constant (Tc2) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcREXS.te-valueRange​

Exciter field time constant (Te) (> 0). Typical value = 1,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcREXS.tf-valueRange​

Rate feedback time constant (Tf) (>= 0). If = 0, the feedback path is not used. Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcREXS.tf1-valueRange​

Feedback lead time constant (Tf1) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcREXS.tf2-valueRange​

Feedback lag time constant (Tf2) (>= 0). If = 0, block is bypassed. Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcREXS.tp-valueRange​

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcREXS.vfmin-valueRangePair​

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcREXS.vrmax

dyn.ExcST3A​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.ExcST3A
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.ExcST3A

Nested Properties:

dyn.ExcST3A.efdmax-valueRange​

Maximum AVR output (Efdmax) (>= 0). Typical value = 6,9.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST3A.kc-valueRange​

Rectifier loading factor proportional to commutating reactance (Kc) (>= 0). Typical value = 1,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST3A.kg-valueRange​

Feedback gain constant of the inner loop field regulator (Kg) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST3A.ki-valueRange​

Potential circuit gain coefficient (Ki) (>= 0). Typical value = 4,83.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST3A.kj-valueRange​

AVR gain (Kj) (> 0). Typical value = 200.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST3A.km-valueRange​

Forward gain constant of the inner loop field regulator (Km) (> 0). Typical value = 7,04.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST3A.kp-valueRange​

Potential source gain (Kp) (> 0). Typical value = 4,37.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST3A.tb-valueRange​

Voltage regulator time constant (Tb) (>= 0). Typical value = 6,67.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST3A.tc-valueRange​

Voltage regulator time constant (Tc) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST3A.tm-valueRange​

Forward time constant of inner loop field regulator (Tm) (> 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST3A.vbmax-valueRange​

Maximum excitation voltage (Vbmax) (> 0). Typical value = 8,63.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST3A.vgmax-valueRange​

Maximum inner loop feedback voltage (Vgmax) (>= 0). Typical value = 6,53.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST3A.vimax-valueRange​

Maximum voltage regulator input limit (Vimax) (> 0). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST3A.vimin-valueRange​

Minimum voltage regulator input limit (Vimin) (< 0). Typical value = -0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is positive or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST3A.vrmax-valueRange​

Maximum voltage regulator output (Vrmax) (> 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST3A.vrmin-valueRange​

Minimum voltage regulator output (Vrmin) (< 0). Typical value = -1.

Messages:

  • "The value is positive or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST3A.xl-valueRange​

Reactance associated with potential source (Xl) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,09.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Maximum inner loop feedback voltage (Vgmax) (>= 0). Typical value = 5,8.

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST4B.vmmin-valueRangePair​

Minimum inner loop output (Vmmin) (< ExcST4B.vmmax). Typical value = -99.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcST4B.vmmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcST4B.vmmax

Maximum voltage regulator output (Vrmax) (> 0). Typical value = 1.

  • "The value is negative or zero."

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST4B.vrmin-valueRange​

Minimum voltage regulator output (Vrmin) (< 0). Typical value = -0,87.

  • "The value is positive or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST4B.xl-valueRange​

Reactance associated with potential source (Xl) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,124.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST6B.tvd-valueRange​

Maximum voltage regulator output (Vamax) (> 0). Typical value = 4,81.

dyn.ExcST7B.kh-valueRange​

High-value gate feedback gain (Kh) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST7B.kia-valueRange​

Voltage regulator integral gain (Kia) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

  • "The value is negative."

ComponentDetails

dyn.ExcST7B.kl-valueRange​

Low-value gate feedback gain (Kl) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

  • "The value is negative."

Regulator lag time constant (Tb) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST7B.tc-valueRange​

Regulator lead time constant (Tc) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST7B.tf-valueRange​

Excitation control system stabilizer time constant (Tf) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST7B.tg-valueRange​

Feedback time constant of inner loop field voltage regulator (Tg) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST7B.tia-valueRange​

Feedback time constant (Tia) (>= 0). Typical value = 3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST7B.ts-valueRange​

Rectifier firing time constant (Ts) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST7B.vmax-valueRange​

Maximum voltage reference signal (Vmax) (> 0 and > ExcST7B.vmin)). Typical value = 1,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST7B.vmin-valueRangePair​

Minimum voltage reference signal (Vmin) (> 0 and < ExcST7B.vmax). Typical value = 0,9.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than ExcST7B.vmax; or negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.ExcST7B.vmax

Maximum voltage regulator output (Vrmax) (> 0). Typical value = 5.

Messages:

sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.ExcST7B.vrmin-valueRange​

dyn.GovCT1​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.GovCT1
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.GovCT1

Nested Properties:

dyn.GovCT1.kturb-valueRange​

Turbine gain (Kturb) (> 0). Typical value = 1,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT1.minerr-valueRangePair​

Minimum value for speed error signal (minerr) (< GovCT1.maxerr). Typical value = -0,05.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovCT1.maxerr."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.GovCT1.maxerr

dyn.GovCT1.mwbase-valueRange​

Base for power values (MWbase) (> 0). Unit = MW.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT1.ta-valueRange​

Acceleration limiter time constant (Ta) (> 0). Typical value = 0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT1.tact-valueRange​

Actuator time constant (Tact) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT1.tb-valueRange​

Turbine lag time constant (Tb) (> 0). Typical value = 0,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT1.tc-valueRange​

Turbine lead time constant (Tc) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT1.tdgov-valueRange​

Governor derivative controller time constant (Tdgov) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT1.teng-valueRange​

Transport time delay for diesel engine used in representing diesel engines where there is a small but measurable transport delay between a change in fuel flow setting and the development of torque (Teng) (>= 0). Teng should be zero in all but special cases where this transport delay is of particular concern. Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT1.tfload-valueRange​

Load-limiter time constant (Tfload) (> 0). Typical value = 3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT1.tpelec-valueRange​

Electrical power transducer time constant (Tpelec) (> 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT1.tsa-valueRange​

Temperature detection lead time constant (Tsa) (>= 0). Typical value = 4.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT1.tsb-valueRange​

Temperature detection lag time constant (Tsb) (>= 0). Typical value = 5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT1.vmin-valueRangePair​

Minimum valve position limit (Vmin) (< GovCT1.vmax). Typical value = 0,15.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovCT1.vmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.GovCT1.vmax

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.GovCT2
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.GovCT2

Nested Properties:

dyn.GovCT2.minerr-valueRangePair​

Minimum value for speed error signal (Minerr) (< GovCT2.maxerr). Typical value = -1.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovCT2.maxerr."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.GovCT2.maxerr

dyn.GovCT2.mwbase-valueRange​

Base for power values (MWbase) (> 0). Unit = MW.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT2.ta-valueRange​

Acceleration limiter time constant (Ta) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT2.tact-valueRange​

Actuator time constant (Tact) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,4.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT2.tb-valueRange​

Turbine lag time constant (Tb) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT2.tc-valueRange​

Turbine lead time constant (Tc) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT2.tdgov-valueRange​

Governor derivative controller time constant (Tdgov) (>= 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT2.teng-valueRange​

Transport time delay for diesel engine used in representing diesel engines where there is a small but measurable transport delay between a change in fuel flow setting and the development of torque (Teng) (>= 0). Teng should be zero in all but special cases where this transport delay is of particular concern. Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT2.tfload-valueRange​

Load limiter time constant (Tfload) (>= 0). Typical value = 3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT2.tpelec-valueRange​

Electrical power transducer time constant (Tpelec) (>= 0). Typical value = 2,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT2.tsa-valueRange​

Temperature detection lead time constant (Tsa) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT2.tsb-valueRange​

Temperature detection lag time constant (Tsb) (>= 0). Typical value = 50.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovCT2.vmin-valueRangePair​

Minimum valve position limit (Vmin) (< GovCT2.vmax). Typical value = 0,175.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovCT2.vmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.GovCT2.vmax

dyn.GovGAST1​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.GovGAST1
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.GovGAST1

Nested Properties:

dyn.GovGAST1.b-valueRange​

Turbine power time constant denominator scale factor (b) (>0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST1.mwbase-valueRange​

Base for power values (MWbase) (> 0). Unit = MW.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST1.r-valueRange​

Permanent droop (R) (>0). Typical value = 0,04.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST1.t1-valueRange​

Governor mechanism time constant (T1) (>= 0). T1 represents the natural valve positioning time constant of the governor for small disturbances, as seen when rate limiting is not in effect. Typical value = 0,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST1.t2-valueRange​

Turbine power time constant (T2) (>= 0). T2 represents delay due to internal energy storage of the gas turbine engine. T2 can be used to give a rough approximation to the delay associated with acceleration of the compressor spool of a multi-shaft engine, or with the compressibility of gas in the plenum of the free power turbine of an aero-derivative unit, for example. Typical value = 0,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST1.t3-valueRange​

Turbine exhaust temperature time constant (T3) (>= 0). T3 represents delay in the exhaust temperature and load limiting system. Typical value = 3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST1.t4-valueRange​

Governor lead time constant (T4) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST1.t5-valueRange​

Governor lag time constant (T5) (>= 0). If = 0, entire gain and lead-lag block is bypassed. Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST1.tltr-valueRange​

Valve position averaging time constant (Tltr) (>= 0). Typical value = 10.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST1.vmin-valueRangePair​

Minimum turbine power, PU of MWbase (Vmin) (< GovGAST1.vmax). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovGAST1.vmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.GovGAST1.vmax

dyn.GovGAST2​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.GovGAST2
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.GovGAST2

Nested Properties:

dyn.GovGAST2.ecr-valueRange​

Combustion reaction time delay (Ecr) (>= 0).

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST2.etd-valueRange​

Turbine and exhaust delay (Etd) (>= 0).

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST2.mwbase-valueRange​

Base for power values (MWbase) (> 0). Unit = MW.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST2.t-valueRange​

Fuel control time constant (T) (>= 0).

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST2.t3-valueRange​

Radiation shield time constant (T3) (>= 0).

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST2.t4-valueRange​

Thermocouple time constant (T4) (>= 0).

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST2.t5-valueRange​

Temperature control time constant (T5) (>= 0).

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST2.tcd-valueRange​

Compressor discharge time constant (Tcd) (>= 0).

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST2.tf-valueRange​

Fuel system time constant (Tf) (>= 0).

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST2.tmin-valueRangePair​

Minimum turbine limit (Tmin) (< GovGAST2.tmax).

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovGAST2.tmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.GovGAST2.tmax

dyn.GovGAST2.tt-valueRange​

Temperature controller integration rate (Tt) (>= 0).

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST2.x-valueRange​

Governor lead time constant (X) (>= 0).

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST2.y-valueRange​

Governor lag time constant (Y) (> 0).

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST3​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.GovGAST3
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.GovGAST3

Nested Properties:

dyn.GovGAST3.tac-valueRange​

Fuel control time constant (Tac) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST3.tc-valueRange​

Compressor discharge volume time constant (Tc) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST3.td-valueRange​

Temperature controller derivative gain (Td) (>= 0). Typical value = 3,3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST3.tg-valueRange​

Time constant of speed governor (Tg) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,05.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST3.tsi-valueRange​

Time constant of radiation shield (Tsi) (>= 0). Typical value = 15.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST3.ttc-valueRange​

Time constant of thermocouple (Ttc) (>= 0). Typical value = 2,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST3.ty-valueRange​

Time constant of fuel valve positioner (Ty) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST4.tcm-valueRange​

  • "The value is negative."

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST4.tm-valueRange​

Compressor discharge volume time constant (Tm) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,2.

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST4.ty-valueRange​

Time constant of fuel valve positioner (Ty) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,1.

dyn.GovGAST​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.GovGAST
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.GovGAST

Nested Properties:

dyn.GovGAST.mwbase-valueRange​

Base for power values (MWbase) (> 0). Unit = MW.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST.r-valueRange​

Permanent droop (R) (>0). Typical value = 0,04.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST.t1-valueRange​

Governor mechanism time constant (T1) (>= 0). T1 represents the natural valve positioning time constant of the governor for small disturbances, as seen when rate limiting is not in effect. Typical value = 0,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST.t2-valueRange​

Turbine power time constant (T2) (>= 0). T2 represents delay due to internal energy storage of the gas turbine engine. T2 can be used to give a rough approximation to the delay associated with acceleration of the compressor spool of a multi-shaft engine, or with the compressibility of gas in the plenum of a free power turbine of an aero-derivative unit, for example. Typical value = 0,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST.t3-valueRange​

Turbine exhaust temperature time constant (T3) (>= 0). Typical value = 3.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovGAST.vmin-valueRangePair​

Minimum turbine power, PU of MWbase (Vmin) (< GovGAST.vmax). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovGAST.vmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.GovGAST.vmax

dyn.GovHydro1​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.GovHydro1
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.GovHydro1

Nested Properties:

dyn.GovHydro1.at-valueRange​

Turbine gain (At) (> 0). Typical value = 1,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydro1.dturb-valueRange​

Turbine damping factor (Dturb) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydro1.gmin-valueRangePair​

Minimum gate opening (Gmin) (>= 0 and < GovHydro1.gmax). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovHydro1.gmax; or negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.GovHydro1.gmax

dyn.GovHydro1.mwbase-valueRange​

Base for power values (MWbase) (> 0). Unit = MW.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydro1.qnl-valueRange​

No-load flow at nominal head (qnl) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,08.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydro1.rperm-valueRangePair​

Temporary droop (r) (GovHydro1.rtemp > GovHydro1.rperm). Typical value = 0,3.

Messages:

  • "The value of GovHydro1.rperm is either equal to or greater than GovHydro1.rtemp."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.GovHydro1.rtemp

dyn.GovHydro1.rperm-valueRange​

Permanent droop (R) (> 0). Typical value = 0,04.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydro1.tf-valueRange​

Filter time constant (Tf) (> 0). Typical value = 0,05.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydro1.tg-valueRange​

Gate servo time constant (Tg) (> 0). Typical value = 0,5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydro1.tr-valueRange​

Washout time constant (Tr) (> 0). Typical value = 5.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydro1.tw-valueRange​

Water inertia time constant (Tw) (> 0). Typical value = 1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydro1.velm-valueRange​

Maximum gate velocity (Vlem) (> 0). Typical value = 0,2.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydro2.tr-valueRange​

Dashpot time constant (Tr) (>= 0). Typical value = 12.

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydro2.tw-valueRange​

Water inertia time constant (Tw) (>= 0). Typical value = 2.

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydro2.uc-valueRange​

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroIEEE2.tw-valueRange​

Water inertia time constant (Tw) (>= 0). Typical value = 2.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroIEEE2.uc-valueRange​

Maximum gate closing velocity (Uc) (<0). Typical value = -0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is positive or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MaxExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroPID2​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.GovHydroPID2
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.GovHydroPID2

Nested Properties:

dyn.GovHydroPID2.gmin-valueRangePair​

Minimum gate opening (Gmin) (> GovHydroPID2.gmax). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovHydroPID2.gmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.GovHydroPID2.gmax

dyn.GovHydroPID2.mwbase-valueRange​

Base for power values (MWbase) (>0). Unit = MW.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroPID2.ta-valueRange​

Controller time constant (Ta) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroPID2.tb-valueRange​

Gate servo time constant (Tb) (> 0).

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroPID2.treg-valueRange​

Speed detector time constant (Treg) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroPID2.tw-valueRange​

Water inertia time constant (Tw) (>= 0). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroPID2.velmax-valueRangePair​

Maximum gate opening velocity (Velmax) (< GovHydroPID2.velmin). Unit = PU / s. Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovHydroPID2.velmin."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.GovHydroPID2.velmin

dyn.GovHydroPID​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.GovHydroPID
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.GovHydroPID

Nested Properties:

dyn.GovHydroPID.mwbase-valueRange​

Base for power values (MWbase) (> 0). Unit = MW.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroPID.pmin-valueRangePair​

Minimum gate opening, PU of MWbase (Pmin) (< GovHydroPID.pmax). Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovHydroPID.pmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.GovHydroPID.pmax

dyn.GovHydroPID.td-valueRange​

Input filter time constant (Td) (>= 0). If = 0, block is bypassed. Typical value = 0.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroPID.tf-valueRange​

Washout time constant (Tf) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,1.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroPID.tp-valueRange​

Gate servo time constant (Tp) (>= 0). If = 0, block is bypassed. Typical value = 0,35.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroPID.tt-valueRange​

Power feedback time constant (Tt) (>= 0). If = 0, block is bypassed. Typical value = 0,02.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroPID.tturb-valueRange​

Turbine time constant (Tturb) (>= 0). See Parameter detail 3. Typical value = 0,8.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroPelton.twng-valueRange​

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroPelton.tx-valueRange​

sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

Targets:

  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.GovHydroWEH

Nested Properties:

dyn.GovHydroWEH.gmin-valueRangePair​

Minimum gate position (Gmin) (< GovHydroWEH.gmax).

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovHydroWEH.gmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.GovHydroWEH.gmax

dyn.GovHydroWEH.mwbase-valueRange​

Base for power values (MWbase) (> 0). Unit = MW.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroWEH.td-valueRange​

Derivative controller time constant (Td) (>= 0). Limits the derivative characteristic beyond a breakdown frequency to avoid amplification of high-frequency noise.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroWEH.tdv-valueRange​

Distributive valve time lag time constant (Tdv) (>= 0).

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroWEH.tg-valueRange​

Value to allow the distribution valve controller to advance beyond the gate movement rate limit (Tg) (>= 0).

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroWEH.tp-valueRange​

Pilot valve time lag time constant (Tp) (>= 0).

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroWEH.tpe-valueRange​

Electrical power droop time constant (Tpe) (>= 0).

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovHydroWEH.tw-valueRange​

Water inertia time constant (Tw) (> 0).

Messages:

  • "The value is negative or zero."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinExclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovSteamEU.tlp-valueRange​

Low pressure (LP) time constant of the turbine (Tlp) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,45.

  • "The value is negative."

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovSteamEU.tp-valueRange​

Power transducer time constant (Tp) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,07.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovSteamEU.trh-valueRange​

Reheater time constant of the turbine (Trh) (>= 0). Typical value = 8.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovSteamEU.tvhp-valueRange​

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovSteamEU.tvip-valueRange​

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovSteamEU.tw-valueRange​

Speed transducer time constant (Tw) (>= 0). Typical value = 0,02.

Messages:

  • "The value is negative."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovSteamEU.wfmin-valueRangePair​

Lower limit for frequency correction (Wfmin) (< GovSteamEU.wfmax). Typical value = -0,05.

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovSteamEU.wfmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.GovSteamEU.wfmax

dyn.GovSteamEU.wwmin-valueRangePair​

Messages:

  • "The value is either equal to or greater than GovSteamEU.wwmax."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.LessThanConstraintComponentPath: cim.GovSteamEU.wwmax

  • "The value is negative."

ComponentDetails
sh.MinInclusiveConstraintComponentValue: 0.0

dyn.GovSteamFV2.tb-valueRange​

Messages:

ComponentDetails

dyn.GovSteamFV2.tc-valueRange​

ComponentDetails

dyn.GovSteamFV2.tt-valueRange​

(Vmin) (< GovSteamFV2.vmax).

dyn.MechanicalLoadDynamics​

MechanicalLoadDynamics shall have either an association to SynchronousMachineDynamics or to AsynchronousMachineDynamics.

Messages:

  • "Required association to either SynchronousMachineDynamics or to AsynchronousMachineDynamics is missing."

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.MechanicalLoadUserDefined
  • targetClass: cim.MechLoad1
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.MechanicalLoadDynamics

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.XoneConstraintComponentShapes: [Nca51c0956db94aa7ba1bc0cedfc0b508, N3a6ece4ba36348a19cc0ace9a3439f1d]

dyn.Pss2ST​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.Pss2ST
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.Pss2ST

Nested Properties:

dyn.Pss2ST.inputSignal1Type-allowedValues​

Type of input signal #1 (rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation, busFrequencyDeviation, generatorElectricalPower, generatorAcceleratingPower, busVoltage, or busVoltageDerivative). Typical value = rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation.

Messages:

  • "Not allowed value for input signal #1."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.InConstraintComponentValues: [cim.InputSignalKind.busVoltage, cim.InputSignalKind.generatorElectricalPower, cim.InputSignalKind.generatorAcceleratingPower, cim.InputSignalKind.busVoltageDerivative, cim.InputSignalKind.rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation, cim.InputSignalKind.busFrequencyDeviation]

dyn.Pss2ST.inputSignal2Type-allowedValues​

Type of input signal #2 (rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation, busFrequencyDeviation, generatorElectricalPower, generatorAcceleratingPower, busVoltage, or busVoltageDerivative - shall be different than Pss2ST.inputSignal1Type). Typical value = busVoltageDerivative.

Messages:

  • "Not allowed value for input signal #2."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.InConstraintComponentValues: [cim.InputSignalKind.busVoltage, cim.InputSignalKind.generatorElectricalPower, cim.InputSignalKind.generatorAcceleratingPower, cim.InputSignalKind.busVoltageDerivative, cim.InputSignalKind.rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation, cim.InputSignalKind.busFrequencyDeviation]

dyn.Pss2ST.lsmin-valueRangePair​

Constraints:

dyn.PssWECC​

Targets:

  • targetClass: cim.PssWECC
  • implicitClassTarget: dyn.PssWECC

Nested Properties:

dyn.PssWECC.inputSignal1Type-allowedValues​

Type of input signal #1 (rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation, busFrequencyDeviation, generatorElectricalPower, generatorAcceleratingPower, busVoltage, or busVoltageDerivative). Typical value = rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation.

Messages:

  • "Not allowed value for input signal #1."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.InConstraintComponentValues: [cim.InputSignalKind.busVoltage, cim.InputSignalKind.generatorElectricalPower, cim.InputSignalKind.generatorAcceleratingPower, cim.InputSignalKind.busVoltageDerivative, cim.InputSignalKind.rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation, cim.InputSignalKind.busFrequencyDeviation]

dyn.PssWECC.inputSignal2Type-allowedValues​

Type of input signal #2 (rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation, busFrequencyDeviation, generatorElectricalPower, generatorAcceleratingPower, busVoltage, busVoltageDerivative - shall be different than PssWECC.inputSignal1Type). Typical value = busVoltageDerivative.

Messages:

  • "Not allowed value for input signal #2."

Constraints:

ComponentDetails
sh.InConstraintComponentValues: [cim.InputSignalKind.busVoltage, cim.InputSignalKind.generatorElectricalPower, cim.InputSignalKind.generatorAcceleratingPower, cim.InputSignalKind.busVoltageDerivative, cim.InputSignalKind.rotorAngularFrequencyDeviation, cim.InputSignalKind.busFrequencyDeviation]
